## Spell Data Update

> **Target branch: `develop`** — All PRs must target `develop`, not `main`.

### Type

- [ ] New spell(s) added
- [ ] Cooldown modified
- [ ] Charges modified
- [ ] Spell removed
- [ ] Other spell data change

### Addon(s) concerned

- [ ] ZaeUI_ActionBars
- [ ] ZaeUI_Defensives
- [ ] ZaeUI_FriendlyPlates
- [ ] ZaeUI_Interrupts
- [ ] ZaeUI_Nameplates
- [ ] ZaeUI_Shared

### Class / Spec

<!-- e.g. Death Knight - Blood, Paladin - All specs -->

### Related Issues

<!-- Link related issues: Closes #123, Relates to #456 -->

### Changes

<!-- List the spells affected: spell name, spell ID, what changed (new, CD value, charges, removed). -->

| Spell Name | Spell ID | Change |
|------------|----------|--------|
|            |          |        |

### Source

<!-- Where did you get the updated values? e.g. Wowhead, in-game testing, patch notes, Blizzard hotfix post -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Spell ID(s) verified on Wowhead or in-game
- [ ] Lua syntax validated (`luac -p`)
- [ ] `luacheck` passes with 0 warnings / 0 errors
- [ ] Tested in-game on Retail
